x-enumDescriptions.Auxiliary: Non software items i.e hardware, peripherals, or anything else that is not software.
x-enumDescriptions.Not Applicable: Items that are not governed by the CLOSA at all.
x-enumDescriptions.Packaged Offering: A bundle that mixes licensed programs and online.
x-enumDescriptions.Specific: Items covered by a separate agreement rather than the standard CLOSA.
